chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1516 of 2021 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of CMA No.6369/2021 2. For hearing of main case 20.08.2021 Mr. Khalid Lateef, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mubarak Ali Shah, advocate for KDA. Mr. Shahzad Raheem, advocate for RespondentsNo.2&3. Mr. Sartaj Malkani, advocate for SBCA. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl.A.G. ------ Counsel for Respondents No.2&3 is present and has made a categorical statement in the open court that he will neither raise any illegal construction nor would conduct any commercial activity on the plot bearing No.C-106 Block-11 situated at F.B. Area, Karachi. The counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the statement made by the counsel for Respondents No.2&3 and does not press the instant petition any further. The instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE
